2f8d155d1e21.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
2f8d155d1e21.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
2f8d155d1e21.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

27c5b55901a7.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
27c5b55901a7.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
27c5b55901a7.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

310ef7d53239.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
310ef7d53239.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

459590d88e03.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
459590d88e03.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
459590d88e03.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

c05ff135bfb9.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
c05ff135bfb9.description: Your 4.7/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P0.0). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
c05ff135bfb9.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

0f49bdea8c91.title: Guest experience outpaces formal trust record
0f49bdea8c91.description: Guests enjoy the venue but the compliance record hasn't kept up. One poor inspection would make a private gap public. The fix is proactive compliance work, not more marketing.
0f49bdea8c91.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible

e0338ac6fc8e.title: Ranked #3 of 3 locally — peers are ahead
e0338ac6fc8e.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

6e117a42c19b.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
6e117a42c19b.description: You trail peers by 2.0 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

c12fcf9896f1.title: Protect the 4.7/5 rating — it took years to build
c12fcf9896f1.description: With 526 reviews at 4.7/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
